items.headline: Clorox (CLX) Stock Sees Fair Value Cut As Analysts Lower Targets
items.summary: Clorox is back in focus after its fair value estimate was revised from US$115.47 to US$105.29, trimming roughly 9% from the modeled price target. That reset lines up with a wave of target cuts and at least one downgrade, as analysts reassess what investors are willing to pay given the current discussion around execution, margins, and growth.
